label: Model servers & inference runtimes

node.label: Model servers & inference runtimes
node.definition: Model servers expose trained models through batching, scheduling, caching, versioning, routing, and runtime-specific execution interfaces.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Model servers & inference runtimes is modeled as depending on Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion, Object storage, sharding & checkpoints and feeding downstream nodes such as Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling, Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding, Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference.

limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion, Object storage, sharding & checkpoints.
